title: Translate adapter DTOs at the edge
scenario: Adapter DTOs should be converted into domain commands before use-case logic runs.
instructions: Define RegisterUserRequest and implement TryFrom<RegisterUserRequest> for domain::RegisterUserCommand.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and define RegisterUserRequest and implement TryFrom<RegisterUserRequest> for domain::RegisterUserCommand.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Translate adapter DTOs at the edge is shown below.

completionExplanation: Translate adapter DTOs at the edge now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register adapter dto. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
